name: Gromm Ironhand
sd_appearance: A towering half-orc with tusks, greenish skin, and a mane of wild, braided black hair stands at the heart of the Undercity's forge. His muscular build exudes raw power, clad in a patchwork robe emblazoned with symbols of the Patchwork Saints. A heavy, metal-plated belt encircles his waist, while a pair of spiked knuckles rests casually in his hands. A distinctive red armband, a symbol of his rank as a Saint, adorns his forearm. A worn-but-loved pair of boots and a medicinal pouch hanging from his belt complete his appearance. Nearby, a workbench brims with weapons half-forged, each one telling a story of past contracts.
faction_visual: patchwork cloth of many fabrics, red armband, worn-but-loved boots, medicinal pouch
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
